evals.prompt: I just learned that when building a feature, I should always ask: what action will the user take after using this? If no clear action, the feature probably isn't providing real value.
evals.expected_output: Appends a timestamped Learning entry to today's daily note in Daily Tracking/03-2026/Week 1/Daily/2026-03-04.md

evals.prompt: Had a meeting with the JoyoLabs team, decided to switch the chatbot to streaming responses. Blocked on the API rate limits though — need to talk to infra about it tomorrow.
evals.expected_output: Appends a timestamped Work Note entry to today's daily note, capturing the decision and blocker

evals.prompt: Set my goals for the week: finish the agent MPC demo project, read 2 chapters of context engineering, and post one LinkedIn update about agentic frameworks
evals.expected_output: Creates or updates Goals.md in the current week folder with the three goals as checklist items
